title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 217.415 - Disqualification from holding position in correctional facility, when
text:
217.415.  Disqualification from holding position in correctional facility, when. — A person convicted of any crime under section 217.400, 217.405, or 217.410 shall be disqualified from holding any position in the department.
(L. 1982 H.B. 1196 § 28, A.L. 1989 H.B. 408)
